pages.title: Nutrition Buff States
pages.text: Your nutrition determines your buff state. These are passive effects that persist as long as you maintain the required food group scores.$(br2)$(thing)Malnourished$() -- Any group at 0 for 2+ days: -15% max HP, -10% movement speed. This is a serious penalty. Eat something from the depleted group immediately.$(br2)$(thing)Undernourished$() -- 3+ groups below 20: -5% HP regen. A warning sign that your diet is too narrow.$(br2)$(thing)Well Fed$() -- 3+ groups above 50: +10% XP gain, faster health regeneration. The first positive tier.

pages.title: Higher States
pages.text: $(thing)Balanced Diet$() -- All 8 groups above 30: +15% max HP, +10% XP, +5% Cultivator perk XP. This is the target for most players. Maintaining all 8 groups requires intentional cooking and meal planning.$(br2)$(thing)Gourmet$() -- All 8 groups above 70, plus at least one $(l:nutrition/quality)Legendary-quality$() food eaten in the last day: +25% XP, rare drop chance boost, unique particle aura.$(br2)The Gourmet state is the reward for mastering the cooking and farming systems together. It requires premium ingredients, skilled preparation, and constant variety.
